user.title: Set up uControl IP Remote
user.description: Enter the IP address of the uControl remote and the number of devices it controls.

error.ip_already_configured: A remote with this IP address is already configured.

abort.already_configured: uControl IP Bridge is already configured.

init.title: uControl IP – Options
init.description: Update the remote IP or number of devices, select buttons to configure, then choose an action. Power buttons: **Power On** = button ID 49, **Power Off** = button ID 50 (e.g. `/api/command/ip/1/49`).

map.title: Map buttons to actions
map.description: Assign a Home Assistant action to each selected button.

import_confirm.title: Import — confirm mode
import_confirm.description: Importing `{filename}`. Choose how to handle existing mappings.

edit_select.title: Edit a button mapping
edit_select.description: Choose a mapped button to edit.

edit_map.title: Edit button action
edit_map.description: Update the action for the selected button.

error.ip_already_configured: A remote with this IP address is already configured.
error.invalid_action: The selected action is invalid. Please choose a valid Home Assistant action.
error.export_failed: Failed to write the export file. Check HA logs for details.
error.no_yaml_files: No YAML files found in the storage directory. Export a mapping first.
error.no_file_selected: Please select a file to import.
error.import_failed: Failed to read or parse the YAML file. Check HA logs for details.

abort.no_mapped_buttons: No buttons are currently mapped. Add mappings first.
abort.invalid_selection: Invalid button selection. Please try again.
